    7304.19.000614209 
    TUBES OR HOLLOW BARS (NOT BEING HONED TUBES), in straight lengths,
 ends plain, bevelled or threaded in accordance with ANY of the
 following tube, hollow bar or pipe material Specification options:
   (a) AS;
   (b) ASME;
   (c) ASTM;
   (d) BS;
   (e) DIN,
 but without further rework, having a length NOT less than four
 times the OD, as listed in THE TABLE:
                              THE TABLE
         Outside Dia                   Wall Thickness
   (a) NOT exceeding 219.08 mm         13.00 mm or greater but
                                       NOT exceeding 25.00 mm;
   (b) 219.08 mm or greater but        12.70 mm or greater but
       NOT exceeding 254.00 mm         NOT exceeding 50.80 mm;
   (c) 254.00 mm or greater but        19.05 mm or greater but
       NOT exceeding 323.85 mm         NOT exceeding 41.00 mm;
   (d) 323.85 mm or greater but        25.40 mm or greater but
       NOT exceeding 720.73 mm         NOT exceeding 75.00 mm

    7318.15.009600835 
    HOSE CLAMP COMPONENTS, WORM DRIVE, being ANY of the following:
   (a) buttress type threaded, rolled right hand screws meeting ALL
       of the following specifications:
          (i) socket head size within the range of 6.14 mm to 6.35 mm
              AF inclusive;
         (ii) head depth within the range of 4.95 mm to 5.42 mm
              inclusive;
        (iii) thread form length within the range of 7.49 mm to
              8.39 mm inclusive;
         (iv) major diameter within the range of 5.84 mm to 6.08 mm
              inclusive;
          (v) minor diameter within the range of 3.7 mm to 3.87 mm
              inclusive;
         (vi) flank angle of 13 degrees + or - 2 degrees;
        (vii) back angle of 2 degrees + or - 2 minutes;
       (viii) pitch within the range of 2.01 mm to 2.05 mm inclusive;
         (ix) flat root width within the range 1.27 mm to 1.33 mm
              inclusive;
          (x) bearing surface diameter within the range of 2.97 mm to
              3.18 mm inclusive;
   (b) rolled right hand thread screws meeting ALL of the following
       specifications:
          (i) socket head size within the range of 7.74 mm to 7.93 mm
              AF inclusive;
         (ii) head depth within the range of 8.00 mm to 8.26 mm
              inclusive;
        (iii) thread form length within the range of 17.00 mm to
              17.53 mm inclusive;
         (iv) major diameter within the range of 8.38 mm to 8.90 mm
              inclusive;
          (v) minor diameter within the range of 5.84 mm to 6.05 mm
              inclusive;
         (vi) flank angle of 20 degrees + or - 2 degrees;
        (vii) back angle of 2 degrees + or - 2 minutes;
       (viii) pitch within the range of 2.51 mm to 2.57 mm inclusive;
         (ix) flat root width within the range of 1.44 mm to 1.53 mm
              inclusive;
          (x) bearing surface diameter, at opposite end to screw
              head, within the range of 5.08 mm to 5.29 mm inclusive;
         (xi) bearing surface width, at opposite end to screw head,
              within the range of 1.78 mm to 2.29 mm inclusive,
   (c) single start rolled right hand thread screws meeting ALL of
       the following specifications:
          (i) complete across head screw slot, located across head
              flats, having a slot width measurement within the range
              of 1.52 mm to 1.63 mm inclusive;
         (ii) head depth within the range of 7.08 mm to 8.00 mm
              inclusive;
        (iii) thread form length within the range of 10.52 mm to
              22.93 mm inclusive;
         (iv) major diameter within the range of 7.56 mm to 7.94 mm
              inclusive;
          (v) minor diameter within the range of 5.80 mm to 6.12 mm
              inclusive;
         (vi) thread angle of 10 degrees;
        (vii) flat crest width within the range of 0.71 mm to 0.75 mm
              inclusive;
       (viii) modified ACME thread of 14 threads per 25.4 mm;
         (ix) bearing surface diameter, underneath screw head, within
              the range of 5.80 mm to 6.10 mm inclusive;
          (x) bearing surface width, underneath screw head, within
              the range of 1.52 mm to 2.06 mm inclusive

    WASH BASINS, HAND, stainless steel, complying with American 
Society for Testing and Materials standard ASTM A959 - 11, 
Type 304, having ALL of the following:
  (a) basin length 500 mm; 
  (b) basin width 420 mm;
  (c) basin depth 246 mm;
  (d) basin thickness 0.8 mm;
  (e) basin perimeter fascia 50 mm deep;
  (f) basin rear splash back 70 mm high
For the purposes of this Order, tolerances allowable for (a) to  
(f) are +/- 10%

    7324.10.001436584

  (c) sink depth 260 mm;:
  (d) sink thickness 0.8 mm;

  (f) sink rear splash back 25 mm high;
  (g) hinged grate, having BOTH of the following:

(g) are +/- 10%

    The Australian Border Force acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country throughout Australia and their continuing connection to land, sea and community. We pay our respects to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples, their cultures and to their elders past, present and emerging.​
